skills.name: Skarphuggning
skills.description: Aim at the upper half of the enemy and slash.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 3
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Hakka Palle
skills.effect_text: Increases Final Damage of Hackapell skill by CaptionRatio %

skills.name: Cavalry Charge
skills.description: Slash and rush towards the targeted enemy. Take the target off of the companion by 50% of chance, and knocks down the ground type enemy including the character.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 3
AoE Attack Ratio SkillSR
Unable to mount Companion for 5 seconds if fallen

skills.name: Grind Cutter
skills.description: Continuously slash the enemy in front per 0.1 seconds for 2.4 seconds.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 0.1 seconds
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR
Duration: 2.4 seconds

skills.name: Infinite Slash
skills.description: Rush towards, slash the enemies you encounter and return to your position. Your movement speed increases momentarily after using the skill.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 5
Targets: CaptionRatio2
Movement Speed: + CaptionRatio
Duration: 3 seconds

skills.name: Helm Chopper
skills.description: Cause to become afflicted with [Stun] by striking the enemy's head, and take off helmet of enemy.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x4
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR
[Stun] duration: CaptionRatio seconds

attributes.name: Skarphuggning: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Skarphuggning] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Cavalry Charge: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Cavalry Charge] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Hackapell: Mounted Dash
attributes.description: * Increases Dash speed by +3 when mounting a Companion

attributes.name: Grind Cutter: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Grind Cutter] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Infinite Slash: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Infinite Slash] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Helm Chopper: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Helm Chopper] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Hakka Palle: Guerilla
attributes.description: * Minimum Critical Rate of [Hakka Palle] increases by [skill level * 3%].

attributes.name: [Arts] Skarphuggning: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Skarphuggning] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Cavalry Charge: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Cavalry Charge] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Grind Cutter: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Grind Cutter] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Infinite Slash: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Infinite Slash] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Helm Chopper: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Helm Chopper] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Cavalry Charge: Elite Cavalry
attributes.description:
* [Cavalry Charge: Elite Cavalry] buff applies for 15 seconds after using [Cavalry Charge]

- Increases Accuracy, Evasion by 100%

- Immune to Knockback, Knockdown

* Increases cooldown by 15 seconds

attributes.name: Hackapell: Dagger Mastery
attributes.description: * Converts 30% of dagger's attack into Physical Attack when equipping a [Dagger] with [One-handed Sword]

attributes.name: Hackapell: Shield Mastery
attributes.description:
* Converts 15% of Shield's Physical Defense into Physical Attack when equipping a [Shield] with [One-handed Sword]

* Cannot use with Swordsman [Shield Mastery: Swordsman] attribute
